title: Compare traditional campus device management with Cisco DNA Center

questions.question: Which product is a replacement for APIC-EM?

correct.explanation: The correct answer is "Cisco DNA Center".

incorrect.explanation: OpenFlow does not match the mechanism asked here.
incorrect.misconceptionTested: Selecting "OpenFlow" without matching the scenario constraint

incorrect.explanation: Cisco Prime Infrastructure does not match the mechanism asked here.
incorrect.misconceptionTested: Selecting "Cisco Prime Infrastructure" without matching the scenario constraint

incorrect.explanation: Cisco SD-WAN does not match the mechanism asked here.
incorrect.misconceptionTested: Selecting "Cisco SD-WAN" without matching the scenario constraint

answerReview.examTip: Cloud management = central dashboard across sites; on-prem DNA Center keeps control inside your network.
